name: language-grid
prompt: Ultra-minimal programming language showcase. Pure white background. 3x3 grid of language names in clean monospace font: "Python | TypeScript | Go" (top row), "React | Node.js | SQL" (middle row), "GraphQL | Docker | K8s" (bottom row). Each cell has very subtle grey border (1px, 10% opacity). One cell (React) highlighted with thin ember orange (#D95B43) border. Lots of padding. No icons, no colors except the single accent. Inspired by Vercel's minimal design language.
